    W

    week - Variable in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.WeeklyReportData
     
    WeeklyReport - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.entity
    JPA entity that persists a pre-computed weekly listening summary for one user.
    WeeklyReport() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.entity.WeeklyReport
     
    WeeklyReportCalendarController - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics
    Calendar controller for selecting weeks in a month.
    WeeklyReportCalendarController() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.WeeklyReportCalendarController
     
    WeeklyReportData - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto
    Display record holding the pre-formatted data for a single weekly report card.
    WeeklyReportData(int, int, int, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.WeeklyReportData
     
    WeeklyReportRepository - Interface in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.repository
    Spring Data JPA repository for WeeklyReport entities.
    WeeklyReportService - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers
    Generates and persists weekly listening reports for the current user.
    WeeklyReportService() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers.WeeklyReportService
     
    WeeklyReportViewModel - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel
    Loads weekly report data asynchronously for a given year and ISO week number.
    WeeklyReportViewModel() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.WeeklyReportViewModel
